name: Dumbbell Side Bends Video Exercise Guide
instructions: Stand tall with feet shoulder-width apart, holding a pair of dumbbells at your side.
Engage your core and keep your chest up.
Slowly bend sideways at the waist toward the dumbbell, lowering it toward your knee.
Pause briefly at the bottom of the movement.
Contract your obliques to return to the starting position. This is one rep.
Complete all reps on one side before switching to the other.

name: Side Crunch (AKA Oblique Crunch) Video Exercise Guide
instructions: Lay supine in a relaxed position with your knees stacked to one side.
Place your contralateral hand behind your head for support and use your free hand to palpate your abdominals.
Initiate the movement by squeezing your abs to raise your torso off the floor, slowly lower yourself back to the starting position and complete the assigned number of repetitions.
Repeat on the opposite side.

name: Wood Chop Video Exercise Guide
instructions: Assume an athletic position with your feet just outside of shoulder width and attach a rope to a cable stack overhead.
Position the inside leg in hip flexion and set up with both hands grasping the rope at roughly shoulder width apart.
Exhale, rotate the rope across your body, and chop to the down knee.
Return to the starting position, repeat for the desired number of repetitions, and then switch sides.

name: Landmine Rotation Video Exercise Guide
instructions: Assume an athletic position with your feet slightly wider than shoulder width and position a barbell in a landmine attachment.
Grasp the end of the barbell by your side with both hands overlapping.
Rotate your shoulders and keep the arms locked out while allowing the end of the barbell to rotate around your body.
Repeat in the opposite direction for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Seated Barbell Twist Video Exercise Guide
instructions: Sit down on a flat bench with your feet around shoulder-width apart, planted firmly on the floor.
Hold a barbell across the back of your shoulders (not your neck), gripping it just outside shoulder-width.
Keep your chest tall and back straight, and engage your core for stability.
Slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs still.
Pause briefly at the end of the twist, feeling the contraction in your obliques.
Return to center, then rotate to the alternate side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of reps.

name: Half Kneeling Cable Chop Video Exercise Guide
instructions: Assume a half kneeling position and attach a rope to a cable stack overhead.
Position the inside knee up and set up with both hands grasping the rope at roughly shoulder width apart.
Exhale, rotate the rope across your body, and chop to the down knee.
Return to the starting position, repeat for the desired number of repetitions, and then switch sides.

name: Tall Kneeling Cable Lift Video Exercise Guide
instructions: Assume a tall kneeling position and attach a rope to a cable stack at the lowest possible position.
Position the inside knee down and set up with both hands grasping the ends of the rope.
Pull the rope to chest height and then press diagonally overhead.
Return to the starting position, repeat for the desired number of repetitions, and then switch sides.

name: Tall Kneeling Cable Chop Video Exercise Guide
instructions: Assume a tall kneeling position and attach a rope to a cable stack overhead.
Position the inside knee up and set up with both hands grasping the rope at roughly shoulder width apart.
Exhale, rotate the rope across your body, and chop to the down knee.
Return to the starting position, repeat for the desired number of repetitions, and then switch sides.

name: Side Plank with Hip Dip Video Exercise Guide
instructions: Assume a side lying position with your forearm resting on the floor.
Lift your hips and form a straight line from your shoulders through your ankles.
Slowly allow the hips to dip and get close to touching the floor.
Return back to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions on both sides.

name: Alternating Seated Dumbbell Side Bends Video Exercise Guide
instructions: Grab a set of dumbbells and sit down on the end of a flat bench with one dumbbell in each hand, palms facing in and hanging by your side.
Keep your feet firmly on the floor with a shoulder-width stance.
Keeping your back straight and your eyes facing forward, use your core to bend down as far as you can on one side, then back up again.
Without pausing at the top, bend down to alternate side.
Repeat for desired reps.

name: Low Cable Wood Chop Video Exercise Guide
instructions: Assume an athletic position with your feet just wider than shoulder width and attach a rope to a cable stack at the lowest position possible.
Position the inside leg in hip extension and set up with both hands grasping the ends of the rope.
Pull the rope to chest height and then press diagonally overhead.
Return to the starting position, repeat for the desired number of repetitions, and then switch sides.

name: Split Stance Cable Chop Video Exercise Guide
instructions: Assume a split stance position and attach a rope to a cable stack overhead.
Position the inside leg in hip flexion and set up with both hands grasping the rope at roughly shoulder width apart.
Exhale, rotate the rope across your body, and chop to the down knee.
Return to the starting position, repeat for the desired number of repetitions, and then switch sides.

name: Split Stance Cable Lift Video Exercise Guide
instructions: Assume a split stance position and attach a rope to a cable stack at the lowest position possible.
Position the inside leg in hip extension and set up with both hands grasping the ends of the rope.
Pull the rope to chest height and then press diagonally overhead.
Return to the starting position, repeat for the desired number of repetitions, and then switch sides.

name: Seated Barbell Twist (On Floor) Video Exercise Guide
instructions: Sit on the floor with your legs extended straight out in front of you.
Hold a barbell across the back of your shoulders (not your neck), gripping it just outside shoulder-width.
Keep your chest tall and back straight, and engage your core for stability.
Slowly rotate your torso to one side, keeping your hips and legs still.
Pause briefly at the end of the twist, feeling the contraction in your obliques.
Return to center, then rotate to the alternate side.
Continue alternating sides for the desired number of reps.

name: Off Bench Oblique Hold Video Exercise Guide
instructions: Setup in a staggered stance with your bottom leg forward and hook your feet underneath a secure bench.
Hold a plate at chest level and press horizontally to extension as you exhale.
Return to the starting position and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name: Half Kneeling Cable Lift Video Exercise Guide
instructions: Assume a half kneeling position and attach a rope to a cable stack at the lowest position possible.
Position the inside knee down and set up with both hands grasping the ends of the rope.
Pull the rope to chest height and then press diagonally overhead.
Return to the starting position, repeat for the desired number of repetitions, and then switch sides.
